target:
# Try the 2005 screenshots page - these are from the older PT2 era
curl -sL "https://web.archive.org/web/20050722010652/http://www.pokertracker.com/screenshots.html" -o /tmp/pt2-screenshots.html 2>&1 && wc -c /tmp/pt2-screenshots.html && grep -i "img src\|\.jpg\|\.gif\|\.png" /tmp/pt2-screenshots.html | grep -v "archive.org\|logo\|nav\|icon" | head -20
